---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    title-block: false
---

::: {.section-page}

# Data Analysis

This section highlights focused technical work in processing, modeling, statistics, and interpretation.

<div class="project-list">

<div class="project-item">
<a class="project-link" href="data-analysis/beam-point-identification.qmd" aria-label="2.1 Automating Beam-Point Identification in Floating Wave Amplifier Experiments">
<div class="project-number">2.1</div>
<div class="project-text">
<div class="project-title">Automating Beam-Point Identification in Floating Wave Amplifier Experiments</div>
<div class="project-tags">
<span class="project-tag">geometric classification</span>
<span class="project-tag">experimental data processing</span>
<span class="project-tag">time-series archive reduction</span>
<span class="project-tag">algorithm design</span>
<span class="project-tag">reproducible workflow development</span>
<span class="project-tag">simulation-support data preparation</span>
</div>
</div>
</a>
</div>

<div class="project-divider"></div>

<div class="project-item">
<a class="project-link" href="data-analysis/constructing-a-polynomial-surrogate-for-wec-array-power.qmd">
<div class="project-number">2.2</div>
<div class="project-text">
<div class="project-title">Constructing a Polynomial Surrogate for WEC Array PTO Power</div>
<div class="project-tags">
<span class="project-tag">surrogate modeling</span>
<span class="project-tag">regression analysis</span>
<span class="project-tag">reduced-order modeling</span>
<span class="project-tag">sensitivity analysis</span>
<span class="project-tag">wave energy</span>
<span class="project-tag">scientific computing</span>
</div>
</div>
</a>
</div>

<div class="project-divider"></div>

</div>

:::
